name: pumasi-codex
description: Codex-native parallel coding orchestration with a bundled image companion skill.

interface.shortDescription: Parallel build orchestration plus image generation for Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `pumasi` orchestration skill and the adjacent `pumasi-image` visual skill into one installable plugin for the Codex marketplace flow.
defaultPrompt: Use pumasi to split this greenfield feature into parallel Codex worker tasks.
Create a bounded worker plan and gates for this multi-module implementation.
Generate a poster or thumbnail with pumasi-image.
